title: Arsenal's Timber fit to start Champions League final
summary: Mikel Arteta confirms Dutch defender Jurrien Timber is ready to play in the Champions League final after recovering from a two-month groin injury. His return strengthens Arsenal's defense for the critical match.
content: Mikel Arteta says that  Dutch defender Jurrien Timber is fit to start the Champions League final after more than two months out with a groin injury.

zh.title: 阿森纳蒂姆伯准备好在欧冠决赛首发
zh.summary: 阿森纳主教练米克尔·阿尔特塔确认荷兰后卫尤里安·蒂姆伯在从两个月的腹股沟伤势中恢复后已准备好参加欧冠决赛。他的复出将加强阿森纳在这场关键比赛中的防线。

title: How Toone is navigating grief through football
summary: England and Manchester United midfielder Ella Toone opens up in a BBC documentary about coping with grief, her football career, and planning her wedding without her father. The documentary provides insight into her personal struggles alongside her professional achievements.
content: England and Manchester United midfielder Ella Toone opens up about grief, football and preparing for her wedding without her dad in a new BBC documentary.

zh.title: 托恩如何通过足球度过悲伤

title: Cohen and Shaw to take joint charge at Lincoln
summary: Lincoln City appoint Chris Cohen and Tom Shaw as joint head coaches following Michael Skubala's departure to Bristol City. The dual leadership structure represents a new approach for the club.
content: Lincoln appoint Chris Cohen and Tom Shaw as joint head coaches in the wake of Michael Skubala's departure to Bristol City.

title: Watch 24 Hours with Ella Toone on BBC iPlayer
summary: A behind-the-scenes documentary series follows Manchester United and England star Ella Toone through her daily life. The series offers fans exclusive access to her professional and personal journey.

title: How Ferguson twice moved to sign Rooney from Everton
summary: David Moyes reveals on the Wayne Rooney Show that Sir Alex Ferguson made two separate attempts to sign teenage Wayne Rooney from Everton before his eventual move to Manchester United. The inside story details Ferguson's persistence in acquiring the young talent.
content: Everton boss David Moyes reveals on the latest episode of the Wayne Rooney Show the inside story on Wayne Rooney's move to Manchester United - with Sir Alex Ferguson twice making moves to sign the then teenage striker.

zh.title: 弗格森如何两次试图签下鲁尼

title: What is Mourinho's managerial record?
summary: The BBC's Ask Me Anything team examines Jose Mourinho's comprehensive managerial track record as he takes on the role of Real Madrid head coach for a second time. His career includes multiple league titles and cup victories across different countries.
content: Our Ask Me Anything team look at the managerial record of new Real Madrid manager Jose Mourinho.

title: Mourinho signs three-year deal to return as Real boss

title: Champions League final still not free to air despite pressure
summary: TNT Sports decides against making the Champions League final between Arsenal and PSG free to watch, requiring fans to pay for a subscription. The decision comes despite public pressure to make the high-profile match widely accessible.
content: Fans will need a subscription to watch the Champions League final between Arsenal and PSG after TNT Sports decides against making the match free to air.

title: Real Madrid named football's most valuable club
